title: aipm.toml
description: AI Package Manager configuration file. Only the [workspace.lints] section is validated; all other sections are intentionally unconstrained.

workspace.description: Workspace configuration for multi-package aipm projects.

lints.description: Lint rule configuration. Keys are rule IDs; values are severity overrides or detailed config objects. Unknown rule IDs are rejected.

ignore.description: Global ignore configuration applied to all lint rules.

paths.description: Glob patterns for files or directories to exclude from all lint rules (e.g. "vendor/**", "third_party/**").

items.description: A glob pattern relative to the workspace root.

^(skill/missing-name|skill/missing-descr.description: Override the severity of a lint rule, or suppress it entirely.

oneOf.description: Simple severity override. "allow" suppresses the rule; "warn"/"warning" makes it advisory (exit 0); "error"/"deny" makes it blocking (exit 1).
Detailed rule override: change severity and/or provide per-rule ignore paths.

ignore.description: Glob patterns to exclude from this specific rule only.

items.description: A glob pattern relative to the workspace root.
